creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: issyl0
Date: Mon Dec 31 18:05:02 2012
New Revision: 40525
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/40525

Log:
  - The nsupdate(8) man page no longer exists: nsupdate(1) replaces it. Change
  the reference in the "network servers" Handbook chapter. [1]
  - Add nsupdate(1) to the man page references file, without removing the old
  one so that translations don't break.
  
  PR:		docs/174791 [1]
  Approved by:	gabor (mentor)

Modified:
  head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-servers/chapter.xml
  head/share/xml/man-refs.ent

Modified: head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-servers/chapter.xml
==============================================================================
--- head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-servers/chapter.xml	Mon Dec 31 17:57:48 2012	(r40524)
+++ head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-servers/chapter.xml	Mon Dec 31 18:05:02 2012	(r40525)
@@ -4371,7 +4371,7 @@ $include Kexample.com.+005+nnnnn.ZSK.key
       <title>Further Reading</title>
 
       <para>BIND/<application>named</application> manual pages:
-	&man.rndc.8; &man.named.8; &man.named.conf.5; &man.nsupdate.8;
+	&man.rndc.8; &man.named.8; &man.named.conf.5; &man.nsupdate.1;
 	&man.dnssec-signzone.8; &man.dnssec-keygen.8;</para>
 
       <itemizedlist>

Modified: head/share/xml/man-refs.ent
==============================================================================
--- head/share/xml/man-refs.ent	Mon Dec 31 17:57:48 2012	(r40524)
+++ head/share/xml/man-refs.ent	Mon Dec 31 18:05:02 2012	(r40525)
@@ -396,6 +396,7 @@
 <!ENTITY man.notify.1 "<citerefentry><refentrytitle>notify</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
 <!ENTITY man.nroff.1 "<citerefentry><refentrytitle>nroff</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
 <!ENTITY man.nsgmls.1 "<citerefentry vendor='ports'><refentrytitle>nsgmls</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
+<!ENTITY man.nsupdate.1 "<citerefentry><refentrytitle>nsupdate</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
 <!ENTITY man.nvi.1 "<citerefentry><refentrytitle>nvi</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
 <!ENTITY man.nview.1 "<citerefentry><refentrytitle>nview</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
 <!ENTITY man.objcopy.1 "<citerefentry><refentrytitle>objcopy</refentrytitle><manvolnum>1</manvolnum></citerefentry>">
